name: custom-fullctx-v4
description: v4: v3's de-trended (length-normalized bimodal trend) families, emitting ONLY full-context 4096-pt series. The trainer buckets series by patch count P=min(L//32,128) and yields P-1 next-patch targets per series, so training targets = BUDGET/32 - N: fewer/longer series means MORE learning per token. All-4096 gives ~+3.9% more targets than v2 (mean L 1056) and trains at EXACTLY the ctx-4096 eval context instead of extrapolating from <=64-patch series. v2 cannot copy this: at 4096 its slope*t trend blows up (~10% worse). Deterministic, numpy-only.
